title: The Mathematics of Memory: Modeling Synaptic Strengths
summary: An exploration of how differential equations and chemical kinetics can help us understand long-term potentiation in the mammalian hippocampus.

title: Why Endurance Runners Make Better Coders (And Scientists)
summary: Comparing the mental grit, incremental progress, and hyper-focus required to finish a 100-mile training cycle with debugging complex algorithms.

title: Getting Started with Biopython for Sequence Analysis
summary: A practical walk-through of script-based genomic querying, reading FASTA files, and computing codon frequencies using standard libraries.
